description: Aboard Newark flight to reach by 7th night.

largest hot spring in the United States and the third largest in the world

Old Faithful, located in Yellowstone National Park’s Upper Geyser Basin, is a famous, highly predictable geyser that erupts every 60–110 minutes.
https://whyy.org/wp-content/uploads/2017/07o/old_faithful_3679482556-1.jpg

Lower Grand Loop road. Cover familiar sights. 
Hayden Valley is located along the central-eastern section of the loop and is widely considered one of the best areas in the park for accessible, roadside wildlife viewing.

comments:
4 hrs 30 mins round trip drive alone. 
Reach Artistic Point 
Brink of lower falls and upper falls on the way - 2 hours

Reach Hayden valley for animal sightings and return
